skills.name: Calendar Day Brief
skills.description: Summarize calendar events without creating, moving, canceling, or inviting.

skills.name: Create Calendar Event With Approval
skills.description: Future approval-gated calendar event creation boundary; not executable in this foundation layer and does not grant invite authority.

skills.name: Calendar Event Draft
skills.description: Prepare a proposed calendar event without creating or inviting.

skills.name: Deployment Publication Review
skills.description: Review a future deployment publication request without deploying.

skills.name: Document Summary
skills.description: Summarize a document through an approved read projection.

skills.name: Inbox Summary
skills.description: Summarize inbox messages through a redacted read-only projection.

skills.name: Email Response Draft
skills.description: Prepare a response draft artifact without sending or mutating mailbox state.

skills.name: Send Email With Approval
skills.description: Future approval-gated external email send boundary; not executable in this foundation layer.

skills.name: Pull Request Summary
skills.description: Summarize repository or pull-request state without pushing or merging.

skills.name: Math Reasoning Plan
skills.description: Calculate, compare scenarios, check units, and explain assumptions without writing records, moving money, or mutating connectors.

skills.name: Memory Observation Candidate
skills.description: Prepare evidence-backed memory observations without writing live memory.

skills.name: Personal Assistant Clarification Request
skills.description: Prepare WHQR clarification requests when an assistant request is missing required bindings.

skills.name: Schedule Optimization Plan
skills.description: Assign operator-supplied work items to operator-supplied time windows without creating events, writing tasks, or mutating systems.

skills.name: Web Research
skills.description: Collect and compare public sources without submission or posting.

skills.name: Create Task With Approval
skills.description: Future approval-gated task creation boundary; not executable in this foundation layer.

skills.name: Task Draft
skills.description: Prepare a task proposal without writing to a task system or memory.

skills.name: TeamOps Shared Inbox Plan
skills.description: Prepare a shared-inbox handoff plan without mailbox mutation.

assurance.next_action: continue foundation-stage assistant hardening without enabling live execution
